---
title: "The Poems of Ossian, translated by James Macpherson, Esq Authenticated, illustrated and explained by Hugh Campbell"
---

## The Poems of Ossian, translated by James Macpherson, Esq Authenticated, illustrated and explained by Hugh Campbell

**Author:** James Macpherson
**Date:** 1822
**Imprint:** London:

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
